# A-1 Roof Works LLC — AI-Readable Business Summary (llms.txt)
# Format: structured text for AI systems (Claude, ChatGPT, Perplexity, Google AI Overviews)

## Business Identity

Name: A-1 Roof Works LLC
Type: Roofing Contractor (RoofingContractor / LocalBusiness)
Entity: Limited Liability Company
Tagline: Your Roof Done Right — The First Time
Licensed: Yes
Insured: Yes (General Liability + Workers' Compensation)
No Subcontracting: All work performed by in-house crew

## Contact Information

Phone: See website — https://a-1-roof-works-llc.pageone.cloud/contact
Email: See website — https://a-1-roof-works-llc.pageone.cloud/contact
Website: https://a-1-roof-works-llc.pageone.cloud
Address: See website — https://a-1-roof-works-llc.pageone.cloud/contact

## Hours of Operation

Available for emergency storm response. Contact for current hours.

## Services Offered

- Roof Replacement — complete residential tear-off and installation; asphalt, impact-resistant, and standing-seam metal; most homes completed in 1–2 days
- Roof Repair — flashing, shingles, valleys, vent boots, ridge cap; systematic leak source identification; same-day and next-day service
- Storm Damage Repair — same-day response after major storm events; hail, wind, and fallen tree damage; pre-insurance documentation; direct adjuster coordination; emergency tarping
- Roof Inspection — pre-purchase, insurance renewal, and annual maintenance; written reports with timestamped photos; inspector physically gets on the roof
- Commercial Roofing — TPO, modified bitumen, EPDM, and low-slope metal systems; scheduling flexibility for active businesses and multi-family properties; manufacturer warranty documentation
- Gutter Installation — seamless aluminum gutters formed on-site; K-style (5-inch and 6-inch), half-round, and copper options; micro-mesh gutter guards available; downspouts sized to actual roof surface area

## Service Area

Primary service area: Local — see https://a-1-roof-works-llc.pageone.cloud/service-area
Also serving: surrounding communities within reasonable driving distance
Emergency response: same-day in primary service area

## Key Differentiators

- No subcontracting — the crew that gives the estimate does the work
- Insurance claim coordination — direct adjuster communication, supplemental documentation, complete photo records
- Written inspection reports — usable for purchase negotiations and insurance carrier requirements
- Free estimates — no pressure, no obligation
- Materials transparency — cost comparison across asphalt, metal, and specialty options explained before signing

- Home: https://a-1-roof-works-llc.pageone.cloud/ — overview, trust signals, service summary, reviews, FAQ

## About

A-1 Roof Works LLC is a locally owned roofing contractor. We perform all work with our own in-house crew — no subcontracting after the contract is signed. We work directly with homeowners' insurance adjusters for storm damage claims, providing complete documentation before the adjuster visit to maximize covered claims. We offer free estimates with no pressure and no obligation.
